name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana – Kishore
administered_by: Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance (MUDRA Ltd. / NCGTC)
retrieval_text: Mid-tier collateral-free loan from Rs 50,001 up to Rs 5 lakh under the Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY), for micro and small non-farm enterprises in manufacturing, trading, and services that have outgrown Shishu-level financing. No collateral is required for loans up to Rs 10 lakh; covered under the Credit Guarantee Fund for Micro Units (CGFMU). Available through scheduled commercial banks, regional rural banks, small finance banks, MFIs, and NBFCs.
